name: Nintex
description: Nintex — process automation and workflow platform for SharePoint, Office 365, and Salesforce. DocGen, RPA, and process intelligence modules.

seo.title: Nintex — Data Integration / ETL / Reverse ETL
seo.meta_description: Nintex: Nintex — process automation and workflow platform for SharePoint, Office 365, and Salesforce. DocGen, RPA, and process intelligence modules.

when_to_use: Workflow automation for SharePoint and Office 365 processes
Document generation and e-signature in Nintex Drawloop
RPA combined with low-code workflow for M365 environments
Process mapping and automation discovery for enterprise teams
Automating approval workflows in SharePoint without coding

pros: DocGen and workflow in a single platform
cons: Best value requires Microsoft or Salesforce stack
Heavier and pricier than Power Automate basics
UI feels older than newer automation tools
review.verdict: Still a strong pick for SharePoint-heavy orgs; modern tenants often land on Power Automate instead.
review.best_for: Enterprises deeply invested in SharePoint, Office 365, or Salesforce
review.not_for: Teams on modern cloud stacks without Microsoft or Salesforce centers of gravity
